column1: # Label crosswalk: source-dataset labels -> OLM leaf taxonomy.
#   - olm_leaf_label uses dotted form `<category>.<object>` matching the
#     configs/taxonomies/olm_leaves.json for the authoritative leaf list.
#   - Lines starting with '#' and blank lines are ignored by the loader.
#   When a source label could map to multiple OLM leaves (e.g. TACO "Glass
#   empirically-dominant case from OLM contributor data:
#     - metal bottle caps -> alcohol.bottle_cap (paired with glass)
#     - plastic bottle caps -> softdrinks.bottle_cap (paired with plastic)
#     - drink cans -> softdrinks.can           (softdrinks more common in litter)
#     - paper/foam cups -> coffee.cup          (coffee cups dominate this form)
#   The user edits incorrect suggestions per the contributor-assist flow;
